title: bidens ochracea
intro: Bidens ochracea, also known as Orange Jewelweed, is a perennial plant in the aster family that grows in wetlands and along streams. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and poison ivy rashes. The health benefits of Bidens ochracea include reducing inflammation, relieving itching and pain, and promoting wound healing. Bidens ochracea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal properties.
